allow:
Bash(git -C /mnt/user/appdata/Docker-compressatorium-webui commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix bugs and improve conversion feedback UI

Bug fixes:
- Fix critical JS syntax error \(extra closing brace in app.js\)
- Fix archive conversions saving CHD to temp dir instead of archive location
- Fix job state not persisting when clearing completed jobs
- Fix jobs not showing after polling due to state replacement

New features:
- Add duplicate output file handling \(rename/overwrite/skip options\)
- Add batch delete endpoint for clearing completed jobs
- Show output destination when files are selected
- Auto-refresh file list when conversion completes

UI improvements:
- Add status icons for each job state \(creating/queued/processing/etc\)
- Show output path and directory for each job
- Add pulse animation for jobs being created
- Better status messages throughout conversion flow
- Placeholder jobs now show expected output location

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
